git clone "Link here without hyphens"  //Used for cloning a github repo
git status  //Used to check status of a repo like changes , untrackable etc
git add "file here without hyphen" // use to add specific files in which changes are made
git add . // use to add all in which changes are made

git commit -m "Message here" //Used to commit all added files in which chages are made

git push origin main  //Now used to uplaod code on github after on git 




Create a new Repo

1 First Make a Repo with git init
make files do code etc
2. Now add changes git add .
3. Now commit git commit -m "Message here"

4. Now to push on github first make a repository on Github lets say i made it Local repo
5. Now git remote add origin https://github.com/Muhammad-Zeeshan-c/Local-Repo.git  //link of that repo made on github
6. git push origin main

we can also check remote on which we are git remote -v
git branch -M to rename branch


Branches
1. Create new branches Gitcheckout -b "branch name"
2. git checkout "branchname" to go to specific branch
3. To delete a branch write git branch -d "branch name"
4. git push origin "custom branch name" to merge in branch made


git push -u origin main //to make short cut to use git push again and again without typing git push origin main


Local Git Workflow
Make Github repo
Clone it
Made changes
Add changes 
commit changes
